DEPT 07. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:M.NORMAN. CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCMAHON, JOHN MCMAHON, ROXANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1024 OAK STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS VACATE ON/BEFORE 5-1-95, PLTFF WILL PAY TO DEFTS THE SUM OF $3300.00 FOR MOVING EXPENSES. PLTFF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATNY FEES.
